meta.title: tga — rent insurance, the way it should work
meta.description: TGA — Brazilian rental guarantee protocol. When tenants miss payments, settlement is automatic. No paperwork, no queue.
meta.ogTitle: tga — rent insurance, the way it should work
meta.ogDescription: Programmable rental guarantee. Automated settlement, verifiable record.

hero.subhead: When the tenant is late, you get paid. No form, no queue, no intermediary deciding when to settle. The protocol sends the payout automatically — and every payout is recorded, public, and verifiable.
hero.manifesto: The protocol that doesn't fail when the market fails.

gap.h2: Renters and investors pay for the same broken layer.

items.label: Time
items.headline: Settlement can wait 60 days.
items.body: Rent can't. Whole families cover mortgages on rent that never arrives.

items.label: Opacity
items.headline: Guarantees nobody audits.
items.body: Traditional providers don't publish payout history. When they collapse, nobody sees it coming.

items.label: Fragility
items.headline: When one provider falls, thousands of contracts fall with it.
items.body: The rental guarantee market needs to stop depending on one player not breaking.

vision.kicker: the path — no dates, no promises
vision.h2: We start with the guarantee. The whole rental layer comes after.

phases.label: Now
phases.title: Rental guarantee
phases.body: Automatic payout to the landlord on default. Programmatic settlement, public record.

phases.label: Next
phases.title: On-chain reputation score
phases.body: Payment history as verifiable reputation — for tenants, landlords, and agencies.

phases.label: After
phases.title: TGA — programmable exposure
phases.body: Investors access the rental-market spread with verifiable NAV and an on-chain settlement log.

phases.label: Horizon
phases.title: Programmable payments and funds
phases.body: Optimizing what most blocks the rental market — transactions, payments, fund custody. Where it makes sense.

bifurcation.h2Line2: We'll let you know when we're ready.

cards.label: Agency / Landlord
cards.body: You rent, manage, or own property. You want a guarantee that pays.
cards.aria: Jump to the landlord and agency waitlist

cards.label: Investor
cards.body: You operate on Solana or DeFi. You want real yield with verifiable collateral.

items: When the tenant is late, you get paid.
No form. No queue. No call to support.
The money lands in the registered account — automatically.
proprietario.dignity: We'll let you know when we're ready. We won't spam.
proprietario.consent: By joining the list, you consent to the use of your email to receive updates about TGA. You can leave any time — just reply to any email with "unsubscribe".

items: Exposure to the Brazilian rental-guarantee spread — specificity generic pools don't have.
Programmatic settlement on-chain. Audit report and code open.
Named founders. Not an anonymous project.

footer.tagline: Rent insurance, the way it should work.
footer.subtitle: Rental guarantee protocol built on Solana.

success.proprietario: received — you're on the landlord list. We'll let you know when we're ready.
success.investidor: received — you're on the investor list. Follow the build at github.com/tga-protocol.

INVALID.proprietario: Invalid email. Check the format and try again.

DUPLICATE.proprietario: That email is already on the list. We'll be in touch.
DUPLICATE.investidor: Already on the list. Check the history on GitHub.

RATE_LIMITED.proprietario: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
RATE_LIMITED.investidor: Rate-limited. Try in a few minutes.
